ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "weekly_sales_date" TEXT /* Date of the sales record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the product sold */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the store where the sale occurred */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "store_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the group to which the store belongs */,
  "sales_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of sale (e.g., regular, discount) */,
  "sales_price" REAL /* Selling price of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of units sold */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated from the sale */,
  "discount_rate" REAL /* Discount rate applied to the sale */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Total discount amount applied to the sale */,
  "coupon_used" INTEGER /* Whether a coupon was used for the sale */,
  "loyalty_program_used" INTEGER /* Whether the customer used a loyalty program for the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_records_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_records_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_records_store_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_group_id") REFERENCES store_groups ("store_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_records_sales_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_type_id") REFERENCES sales_types ("sales_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_records_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "product_image" TEXT /* Image URL of the product */,
  "product_videos" TEXT /* Video URLs of the product */,
  "reviews" TEXT /* Reviews of the product */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "store_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store group */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the store */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the store is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the store is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the store */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the store */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_groups" (
  "store_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the store group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the store group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_types" (
  "sales_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales type */,
  "sales_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales type (e.g., regular, discount) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sales type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the product is stocked */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being stocked */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product */,
  "low_stock_threshold" INTEGER /* Low stock threshold for the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the store */,
  "week_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the week for the analysis */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue for the week */,
  "total_quantity" INTEGER /* Total quantity sold for the week */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price for the week */,
  "sales_trend" TEXT /* Sales trend for the week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_analysis_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "entity_affected" TEXT /* Entity affected by the action (e.g., product, store) */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Changes made to the entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the loyalty program */,
  "rewards" TEXT /* Rewards offered by the loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coupons" (
  "coupon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coupon */,
  "coupon_code" TEXT /* Code for the coupon */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the coupon */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount offered by the coupon */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the coupon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coupon_id")
)
